title: Auth Foundation: Building Better Auth, Creem Billing, and Email Infrastructure for Shipping API Dojo v2
summary: Issue #11 completed the auth, entitlements, billing, email, and domain foundation for Shipping API Dojo v2. Better Auth, Creem, Resend, and the shipping.apidojo.app domain came together.
body: # Auth Foundation: Building Better Auth, Creem Billing, and Email Infrastructure for Shipping API Dojo v2
heroImageAlt: An infrastructure diagram showing Better Auth integration, Creem billing setup, Resend email configuration, and the shipping.apidojo.app domain foundation
author: Nicolas Brulay
